overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2046 Term Treasury ETF (IBGC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE 2046 Maturity US Treasury index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury bonds maturing between January and December 2046. The fund will terminate in December 2036. IBGC was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
